chapters.title: Excuse me!
chapters.content:
Excuse me!
Yes?
Is this your handbag?
Pardon?
Is this your handbag?
Yes, it is.
Thank you very much.

chapters.title: Is this your...
chapters.content:
Pen.
Pencil.
Book.
Watch.
Coat.
Dress.
Skirt.
Shirt.
Car.
House.

chapters.title: Sorry, sir.
chapters.content:
My coat and my umbrella please.
Here is my ticket.
Thank you, sir.
Number five.
Here's your umbrella and your coat.
This is not my umbrella.
Sorry, sir.
Is this your umbrella?
No, it isn't.
Is this it?
Yes, it is.
Thank you very much.

chapters.title: Nice to meet you.
chapters.content:
Good morning.
Good morning, Mr. Blake.
This is Miss Sophie Dupont.
Sophie is a new student.
She is French.
Sophie, this is Hans.
He is German.
Nice to meet you.
And this is Naoko.
She's Japanese.

chapters.title: What make is it?
chapters.content:
Volvo.
Peugeot.
Mercedes.
Toyota.
Daewoo.
Mini.
Ford.

chapters.title: Are you a teacher?
chapters.content:
I am a new student.
My name's Robert.
Nice to meet you.
My name's Alice.
Are you French?
Yes, I am.
Are you French too?
No, I am not.
What nationality are you?
I'm Italian.
Are you a teacher?
No, I'm not.
What's your job?
I'm a keyboard operator.

chapters.title: What's your job?
chapters.content:
Policeman.
Policewoman.
Taxi driver.
Air hostess.
Postman.
Nurse.
Mechanic.
Hairdresser.
Housewife.
Milkman.

chapters.title: How are you today?
chapters.content:
Hello, Helen.
Hi, Steven.
How are you today?
I'm very well, thank you. And you?
I'm fine, thanks.
How is Tony?
He's fine, thanks. How's Emma?
She's very well, too, Helen.
Goodbye, Helen. Nice to see you.
Nice to see you, too, Steven. Goodbye.

chapters.title: Look at...
chapters.content:
Look at that man.
He's fat.
Look at that woman.
She's thin.
Look at that policeman.
He's tall.
